title: SOTC Travel is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: SOTC Travel is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, SOTC Travel in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SOTC Travel:
SOTC Travel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SOTC Travel!
